1848060.name: ToS Gamepad Companion - Vibration Companion Upgrade Pack
1848060.description:
🎮 ToS Gamepad Companion - Vibration Companion Upgrade Pack DLC


ToS Gamepad Companion - Vibration Companion Upgrade Pack, an enhanced experience for ToS Gamepad Companion - Vibration Companion!

🔗 Multiplayer Support
Connect and use up to 4 gamepads simultaneously for an immersive multiplayer experience.

📚 Expanded Layouts
Access 5 additional layout groups, allowing you to save a total of 40 unique layouts tailored to your preferences.

📝 Custom Layout Names
Personalize your layouts by assigning custom names to each one, making it easier to organize and switch between them.
